song.title: Communion
song.author: Third Day
song.lyrics:
[C] .E B F# E B . E B This is the body. |This is the blood . F# B Broken and poured out |for all of us . E In this communion . G#m We share in His love . F# E This is the body . B This is the blood
[V1] .G#m E B I will remember everything, Lord . F# That You’ve done for me .G#m E I won’t take for granted . B F# The sacrifice that set me free .D#m E I hunger and thirst for Your love .D#m F# Come fill me today
[B] .D#m E We hunger and thirst for Your love .D#m E And Your righteousness .D#m E We long for Your presence here, Lord .D#m F# Be with us again
